label: Transparent mammatus cloud motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Mammatus Cloud transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated mammatus cloud formation motif for a design-system catalog, no landscape, no horizon, no rain, no lightning, no text.
Subject: A sculptural cluster of mammatus cloud pouches hanging beneath a storm anvil, rounded pouch lobes with dramatic underlighting, slate purple shadows, peach sunset rim light, storm grey body tones, soft vapor texture, crisp readable silhouette edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cloud cutout with generous padding on all sides; a compact horizontal cluster that can work as a motif asset; no cropping.
Lighting/mood: storm sunset drama with peach glow along pouch edges, slate-purple depth, and grey storm volume while preserving clean separable edges.
Chroma-key background: create the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the cloud.
Constraints: no tornado, no funnel cloud, no lightning bolt, no ground, no mountains, no buildings, no aircraft, no birds, no person, no labels, no watermark, no UI, no frame.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous catalog bundle
Input image: use the mammatus cloud cutout as the motif reference for color, texture, silhouette, and component language.
Primary request: Create one wide high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mammatus Cloud" / "Mammatus Cloud", a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dramatic dashboard system.
Visual identity: storm sunset mammatus cloud. Palette: slate purple, peach sunset rim light, storm grey, pale vapor, deep anvil charcoal, muted lavender, warm warning peach, cool rain blue-grey. Keep the system dramatic but usable for dense operational dashboards.
Board content: include readable sections for palette, typography, English and Japanese type guidance, component tokens, navigation, dashboard/data visualization, cards, tables, forms, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, command/search, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, cloud-grain texture, icon treatment, and sample app usage.
UI language: rounded mammatus pouch panels, suspended soft-shadow cards, storm-front dividers, peach focus rings and active states, slate-purple primary actions, storm-grey surfaces, restrained peach alerts, cloud-lobe data cards, high-contrast dashboard charts.
Composition: premium dense design board with large legible labels, no tiny unreadable token tables, organized grid, enough whitespace, no nested cards, professional product-system presentation.
Text requirements: title should read "Morphous Mammatus Cloud" and include short labels only; include Japanese typography guidance labels without overpacking.
Constraints: no generic purple-blue gradient dominance, no unrelated saturated colors, no beach/sand palette, no lightning as main motif, no tornado, no landscape photo, no random brand logos, no watermarks, no misspelled title, no fake small paragraph text blocks.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous catalog bundle
Input images: use the mammatus cloud cutout and the light-mode board as reference for motif language, palette, component coverage, and layout density.
Primary request: Create one wide high-resolution 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mammatus Cloud" / "Mammatus Cloud", translated from the light board into a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dramatic dashboard system.
Visual identity: storm sunset mammatus cloud in dark mode. Palette: deep anvil charcoal and black-violet backgrounds, slate purple panels, storm grey borders, pale vapor text, peach sunset glow for focus and warnings, muted lavender secondary states, rain blue-grey information states. Keep it dramatic, operational, and readable for dense dashboards.
Board content: include readable sections for palette, typography, English and Japanese type guidance, component tokens, navigation, dashboard/data visualization, cards, tables, forms, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, command/search, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, cloud-grain texture, icon treatment, and sample app usage.
UI language: rounded mammatus pouch panels, suspended soft-shadow cards, storm-front dividers, peach focus rings and active states, slate-purple primary actions, dark storm-grey surfaces, restrained peach alerts, cloud-lobe data cards, high-contrast dashboard charts.
Composition: premium dense design board with large legible labels, no tiny unreadable token tables, organized grid, enough whitespace, no nested cards, professional product-system presentation.
Text requirements: title should read "Morphous Mammatus Cloud" and include short labels only; include Japanese typography guidance labels without overpacking.
Constraints: no generic purple-blue gradient dominance, no unrelated saturated neon colors, no beach/sand palette, no lightning as main motif, no tornado, no landscape photo, no random brand logos, no watermarks, no misspelled title, no fake small paragraph text blocks.
